message:
style(tests): cargo fmt the #248 regression test to unblock CI

The new e2e_sync_import_force_preserves_integrity_and_close_works test landed
without running `cargo fmt` first, so the 'Check formatting' step in the CI
workflow started failing on main.  Apply the rustfmt diff verbatim.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
